nasb.text: It will come about at that time That I will search Jerusalem with lamps, And I will punish the men Who are stagnant in spirit, Who say in their hearts, ‘The Lord will not do good or evil!’

esv.text: At that time I will search Jerusalem with lamps, and I will punish the men who are complacent, those who say in their hearts, ‘The Lord will not do good, nor will he do ill.’

cnv.text: 那時， 我必提燈搜查耶路撒冷， 懲罰那些在罪中陶然自得的人。 這些人心裡說： ‘耶和華必不賜福，也不降禍。’

ccb.text: 那时，我必提着灯巡查耶路撒冷， 惩罚那些安于罪中的人。 他们心想，‘耶和华不赐福也不降祸。’
